name: GKE Clusters No Alpha Features
description: GKE clusters should not have alpha features enabled as they are not covered by GKE SLA and may have stability issues
remediation: Alpha clusters cannot be upgraded to standard clusters. Create a new cluster without alpha features and migrate workloads
remediation_steps: Create a new GKE cluster without alpha features
Migrate workloads to the new cluster
Note: Alpha clusters cannot be converted to standard clusters
